name: beads-orchestrator
description: Coordinate Beads issues through implementation and review Codex threads.

interface.shortDescription: Run ready Beads through worker and review threads.
interface.longDescription: Adds a Codex skill for orchestrating Beads issue queues. The orchestrator claims ready beads, creates same-directory implementation and review threads at standard speed, monitors progress with a five-minute heartbeat, owns Beads comments/status updates, and closes work only after review passes.
